query:
SELECT up.assignedBusinessLines, up.territories, u.name
FROM userProfiles up
JOIN users u ON u.id = up.userId
WHERE u.name IN ('Ryan Pemberton', 'Amit Bhargava', 'Daniel Zec', 'Dan Day')
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT up.assignedBusinessLines, up.territories, u.name
FROM userProfiles up
JOIN users u ON u.id = up.userId
WHERE u.name IN ('Ryan Pemberton', 'Amit Bhargava', 'Daniel Zec', 'Dan Day')
LIMIT 10;
